regions.text: The most important materials in our bodies are the proteins. We can see how complex they are by comparing their formula with water (H2O) or carbon dioxide (CO2).
Formula for a protein from milk: C1864 H3012 N468 S21 O576. Water: H2O. Carbon dioxide: CO2.
The letter N represents nitrogen and S represents sulphur. among: being part of a group. nitrogen: a gas in the air. sulphur: a yellow material.
